positive: A minimalist, high-contrast design featuring a stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset. The mountains should be composed of clean, abstract peaks and ridges, utilizing geometric shapes. Below the mountains, incorporate a subtle, stylized crescent moon and a few scattered abstract stars. The color palette should be restricted to deep indigo, muted gold, burnt orange, and charcoal black. The style should evoke Japanese woodblock printing (Ukiyo-e) meets modern graphic design, offering excellent contrast and clean edges for apparel printing. Central composition, perfect for a centered chest print, with clean negative space around the main elements. Flat graphic rendering, high detail, vector quality, designed for screen printing.
